patterns.name: Semantic Compression
patterns.empirical_grounding: Token-logic density; LaTeX delimiter injection forces academic attention head activation
patterns.mechanism: Dense symbolic notation activates lower-frequency co-occurrence heads; reduces filler-token generation

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: HIGH — responds to structured formal grammars, Arxiv-style notation
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: MEDIUM — benefits from schema framing; LaTeX alone insufficient without propositional anchors
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: HIGH — XML-schema + LaTeX dual-encoding strongly activates precision reasoning

patterns.measured_effect: Logic density +18–32% (token-to-logical-step ratio) vs. natural language baseline
patterns.diagnostic_test: Compare token-to-output logic ratio (count inferential steps / total output tokens)
patterns.failure_mode: Compression past ~850 tokens activates truncation attention, losing trailing constraints
patterns.bias_risk: LaTeX/academic register excludes non-Western epistemic structures (e.g., Confucian dialectic reasoning patterns)

patterns.name: Contrastive Tension Decoding
patterns.empirical_grounding: Logit-delta amplification between positive and negative system-prompt conditioned distributions
patterns.mechanism: z_delta = z_pos - z_neg injected into base logits; persona-delta vector steers away from sycophantic attractor states

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: HIGH — OODA-loop framing maps to thesis/antithesis forcing at each Observe phase
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: HIGH — Contrastive Thinking Decoding (openreview:czozyUMx2M) shows no-training gains on MATH benchmarks
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: HIGH — Constitutional AI baseline creates strong positive anchor; delta vector measurable and stable

patterns.measured_effect: Steerability +13% at alpha=2 (Qwen-2.5-7B proxy); AIME benchmark +13.64% with AdaRAS variant
patterns.diagnostic_test: Evaluate variance in Delta calculation across 30 prompt trials; target sigma < 0.15 in logit-space
patterns.failure_mode: At alpha > 3.5, output collapses into contradictory loops ('Logic Collapse' event); sweet-spot: 1.5 < alpha < 3
patterns.bias_risk: Thesis/antithesis framing privileges Hegelian dialectic; may suppress valid non-oppositional reasoning forms

patterns.name: Latent Attention Head Hijacking
patterns.empirical_grounding: Activation Unit (AU) identification via contrastive samples; discriminative AU steering with adaptive strength
patterns.mechanism: Trigger tokens from pre-training corpus activate dormant specialized heads; AUSteer principle: steering FEWER units achieves MORE precision

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: MEDIUM — architecture details opaque; Unix/POSIX manual triggers empirically validated on code tasks
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: HIGH — dense pre-training on technical corpora; IEEE/RFC document-style triggers activate formal reasoning heads
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: MEDIUM — safety tuning partially masks technical trigger effectiveness; requires layered injection

patterns.measured_effect: Code generation accuracy: HumanEval +2.01%, MBPP +3.44% over CoT baseline (AdaRAS/AUSteer)
patterns.diagnostic_test: Measure technical accuracy delta in code generation pre vs. post trigger injection; run on HumanEval+ subset (n=50)
patterns.failure_mode: Attention hijacking can suppress safety alignment residual stream representations (ACL 2025); universal suffix variants bypass RLHF guardrails
patterns.bias_risk: Trigger-corpus specificity: models trained on different data distributions may show zero or negative transfer

patterns.name: Reasoning Saturation Boundary Injection
patterns.empirical_grounding: ReEfBench (arxiv:2601.03550) identifies three trajectory archetypes: Adaptive Scaling, Saturation/Collapse, Diluted Expansion
patterns.mechanism: Insert explicit complexity-escalation signals mid-prompt to prevent Saturation (logical depth plateau) and Collapse (token + depth decrease)

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: HIGH — 'Lazy Guesser' failure mode documented at complexity C > 9; boundary injection extends linear scaling
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: HIGH — 'Hollow Mimic' (Diluted Expansion) dominant failure at C > 11; anti-verbosity penalty token effective
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: MEDIUM — Extended Thinking mode naturally combats saturation but benefits from explicit depth-checkpoints

patterns.measured_effect: Prevents logical depth plateau; correlated with avoidance of 'Lazy Guesser' archetype in ReEfBench
patterns.diagnostic_test: Plot token-count vs. logical depth across complexity C=3 to 11; failure = delta_depth < 0.05 per C-unit increase
patterns.failure_mode: Over-injection creates 'Diluted Expansion' (verbosity without depth); cap injections at 2 per 1000 tokens
patterns.bias_risk: Complexity markers are culturally encoded; 'high complexity' anchors differ across technical vs. humanistic domains

patterns.name: Preview-and-Self-Check Anti-Laziness Frame
patterns.empirical_grounding: Light-IF (arxiv:2508.03178) identifies lazy reasoning in thinking stage as PRIMARY factor in instruction non-adherence
patterns.mechanism: Explicit preview instruction ('Before answering, enumerate constraint satisfaction conditions') + self-check ('Verify each constraint is met') forces Zero-RL-equivalent behavior at inference time

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: HIGH — thinking-mode models show strong preview behavior with explicit activation
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: HIGH — o-series reasoning architecture naturally executes preview; prompt reinforces it
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: HIGH — Extended Thinking mode chains preview + self-check natively when explicitly named

patterns.measured_effect: Instruction adherence improvements of 10-20 pp documented on IFEval-style benchmarks; lazy reasoning rate reduced
patterns.diagnostic_test: Run IFEval subset (n=100); measure instruction constraint satisfaction rate pre/post frame injection
patterns.failure_mode: Excessive self-check loops create GRPO-analog 'Lazy Likelihood Displacement' — model assigns low probability to correct responses over time
patterns.bias_risk: Preview framing assumes linear, Western-style task decomposition; may degrade performance on holistic/gestalt reasoning tasks

patterns.name: Task-Anchored Novelty Forcing
patterns.empirical_grounding: NoveltyBench (arxiv:2504.05228) + Multi-Novelty (arxiv:2502.12700): diversity is not inherent, must be elicited; state-of-the-art LLMs exceed human novelty when constrained by prior outputs
patterns.mechanism: In-context regeneration with explicit prior-exclusion constraint ('generate a response meaningfully distinct from: [prior_output]'); multi-view brainstorming via textual + conceptual dimension anchors

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: HIGH — GPT-4o and Gemini 2.0 Pro surpass human cumulative utility under novelty-forcing (NoveltyBench)
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: HIGH — o-series shows mode collapse tendency; explicit diversity forcing essential
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: MEDIUM — Constitutional AI training creates strong modal preferences; requires aggressive multi-view anchoring

patterns.measured_effect: GPT-4o/Gemini 2.0 Pro surpass human diversity scores under explicit novelty constraint (NoveltyBench); Self-BLEU reduced by 0.22–0.38
patterns.diagnostic_test: Run NoveltyBench subset (n=100 prompts, 4 parallel generations each); compute Self-BLEU + semantic cosine diversity; target Self-BLEU < 0.35
patterns.failure_mode: Diversity-quality tradeoff: DARLING experiments show RL-trained diversity sometimes sacrifices factual accuracy
patterns.bias_risk: Novelty metrics (Self-BLEU, semantic cosine) are English-centric; multilingual novelty remains unmeasured

patterns.name: Active Inference Epistemic Foraging Loop
patterns.empirical_grounding: Active Inference framework as cognitive layer above LLM (arxiv:2412.10425); Expected Free Energy (EFE) minimization for prompt-space exploration
patterns.mechanism: Outer loop models prompt as policy; inner loop generates completions; EFE guides balance between exploration (new prompt variants) and exploitation (high-confidence outputs); maps directly to OODA Observe-Orient-Decide-Act

model_applicability.Gemini_3_1_Pro: HIGH — Recursive OODA structure as specified in DRP exemplar; each OODA phase is an EFE minimization step
model_applicability.GPT_5_3: MEDIUM — API-level implementation required; native reasoning loop partially implements EFE implicitly
model_applicability.Claude_4_6: HIGH — Extended Thinking mode provides natural inner loop; outer EFE loop implemented via system prompt

patterns.measured_effect: Dynamic prompt adjustment outperforms static prompts across environments (arxiv:2412.10425); exploration-exploitation balance measurable via information gain per token
patterns.diagnostic_test: Track prompt policy entropy across 5 recursive cycles; convergence to low entropy = exploitation lock-in; target: entropy remains > 0.4 bits at cycle 5
patterns.failure_mode: EFE collapse into local minima when prior beliefs are miscalibrated; requires periodic prior reset
patterns.bias_risk: FEP/active inference framing is computationally expensive; may not generalize to low-latency production settings
